rationale: Section 11.131 grants disabled veterans and surviving spouses an exemption of the TOTAL appraised value of their homestead, independent of the dollar-amount exemption in Section 11.13(b). Raising the §11.13(b) amount does not alter §11.131's operation or definitions.
quote: "Residence homestead" has the meaning assigned by Section 11.13.
_note: No conflict. §11.131 references §11.13 only for the definition of 'residence homestead,' not for the exemption dollar amount. The proposed change to §11.13(b) does not affect §11.131's total-value exemption.
